title: ML Job Ready Bootcamp
subtitle: Become Job-Ready in 3–6 Months
description: Master machine learning and AI systems through live, mentor-led training. Build real-world projects, deploy models, and develop job-ready skills that companies actively look for.

projects.title: Predictive Analytics System
projects.description: Build a regression model to predict future sales trends and business outcomes.

projects.title: Customer Segmentation Model
projects.description: Use clustering to group customers based on behavior for targeted marketing.

projects.title: Image Classification Project
projects.description: Develop a deep learning model for visual recognition and object detection.

projects.title: End-to-End ML Deployment Project
projects.description: Deploy a complete machine learning model into a production environment.

requirements: No prior experience required—just consistency and commitment.

curriculum.title: Intro to Machine Learning & Statistics

lessons.title: What is ML? Types and Real-world applications
Descriptive Statistics: Mean, Median, Mode, Std Dev

curriculum.practice: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) on a basic dataset
curriculum.outcome: Students understand ML terminology and the mathematical backbone of data analysis.

curriculum.title: Python for Data Science
curriculum.practice: Automating data summary reports using Pandas
curriculum.outcome: Students can load, manipulate, and visualize datasets efficiently using Python.

curriculum.title: Data Preprocessing & Cleaning
curriculum.practice: Preparing a 'dirty' dataset for machine learning models
curriculum.outcome: Students gain the ability to turn raw, messy data into high-quality training features.

curriculum.title: Supervised Learning (Regression)
curriculum.outcome: Students can build predictive models for continuous values and evaluate performance.

curriculum.title: Supervised Learning (Classification)
curriculum.practice: Spam detection or Loan approval project
curriculum.outcome: Students can build robust classification models and interpret evaluation metrics.

curriculum.title: Unsupervised Learning
curriculum.outcome: Students can identify patterns and group data in practical scenarios.

curriculum.title: Deep Learning Fundamentals

lessons.title: Neural networks, layers, and activation functions
When to use Deep Learning vs Traditional ML

curriculum.outcome: Students gain a strong beginner-level understanding of deep learning concepts and tools.

curriculum.title: Capstone & Job Readiness
curriculum.outcome: Students complete a portfolio-ready ML project and strengthen job readiness.

testimonials.name: SVEN
testimonials.text: I can't emphasize enough how valuable this course is. Learning Python through this course completely shifted my professional focus.
